entry.title: Re: MKVZ Enhancement by creating a custom program
entry.content: Never ever copy any standard program. Just do the few modifications you need.

entry.title: Re: I want to import 100 lines of GRPO in SAP B1
entry.content:
Hi Samudra Gupta,

Importing GRPOs (and other transactions as well) is best done with the Data Transfer Workbench. This software is included in the SAP Business One installation media.

Once installed, you can find a folder with Excel templates in the Windows Start menu:

it will open the folder in a Windows Explorer window. Please browse to the Goods Receipt PO subfolder.

Fill in the necessary templates, save them as Text (Tab delimited) and import them with the DTW. I recommend that you try this out in a test database first.

Please note, that all master data (products, business partners, tax, etc) must be in the system. You can use the DTW also to enter or update master data.

Regards,

Johan

entry.title: ADT installation error - Eclipse 2023-12
entry.content:
I get the error when installing ADT in Eclipse 2023-12.  Any suggestions to resolve this? (A previous thread on this same issue suggested using the offline ADT plugin, but I do not have access to download the offline ADT)

Thanks,

KP

Let me try this out

Regards,

Karthika

entry.title: Re: Link to external url in sac table
entry.content: thanks !!

entry.title: Creating Custom Button and Event Handling in SALV (SAP List Viewer)
entry.content:
The SAP List Viewer (SALV) is a powerful tool in SAP ABAP that simplifies the creation and display of interactive lists. While SALV provides a range of standard functionalities, there are scenarios where you might need to enhance the user experience by adding custom buttons and handling events associated with them. In this blog, we'll explore the step-by-step process of creating a custom button and handling events in SALV. 

  In this process i have used some standard classes mentioned below: - 

CL_SALV_TABLE 

CL_SALV_EVENTS_TABLE 

 

Procedure: - To achieve this First we have to Create one report program then we have to create one local class in that local class create Handle click and added function method and implement that method.  

 

REPORT zna_rp_scn_salv.

DATA : lo_table  TYPE REF TO cl_salv_table,
        lo_events TYPE REF TO cl_salv_events_table,
        lt_emp TYPE TABLE OF zna_t_emp,
        ls_emp TYPE zna_t_emp,
        lo_cx  TYPE REF TO cx_salv_msg.

CREATE OBJECT lo_cx.

CLASS lcl_salv_handler DEFINITION.
   PUBLIC SECTION.

    CLASS-METHODS : handle_click FOR EVENT double_click OF cl_salv_events_table
       IMPORTING row column.

    CLASS-METHODS : added_function FOR EVENT added_function OF cl_salv_events_table
       IMPORTING e_salv_function.
 ENDCLASS.

CLASS lcl_salv_handler IMPLEMENTATION.
   METHOD: handle_click .
     MESSAGE sy-ucomm TYPE zif_na_salv_constants=>message."'I'.
     READ TABLE lt_emp INDEX row INTO ls_emp.
     DATA msg TYPE string.

    IF column EQ zif_na_salv_constants=>id."'EMP_ID'.
       MESSAGE i000(zna_scn_msg)  WITH ls_emp-emp_id . "'You choose employee id:'
 message msg TYPE 'I'.
     ENDIF.
   ENDMETHOD.

  METHOD added_function .

    MESSAGE e_salv_function  TYPE zif_na_salv_constants=>message.  "'I'.
   ENDMETHOD.


ENDCLASS.

START-OF-SELECTION.

  SELECT * FROM zna_t_emp
     INTO CORRESPONDING FIELDS OF TABLE lt_emp.

  TRY .
       cl_salv_table=>factory(

        IMPORTING
           r_salv_table   =  lo_table                         " Basis Class Simple ALV Tables
         CHANGING
           t_table        = lt_emp
       ).
     CATCH cx_salv_msg INTO lo_cx. " ALV: General Error Class with Message
       WRITE : zif_na_salv_constants=>wstatment.  "'Error Occured'.
   ENDTRY.

  lo_table->set_screen_status(
     EXPORTING
       report        =   sy-repid               " ABAP Program: Current Master Program
       pfstatus      = 'ZPFSTATUS'               " Screens, Current GUI Status
       set_functions = cl_salv_table=>c_functions_all " ALV: Data Element for Constants
   ).


  CASE sy-ucomm.
     WHEN  zif_na_salv_constants=>back.  "'BACK'.
       LEAVE PROGRAM.
   ENDCASE.


  lo_events = lo_table->get_event( ).
   SET HANDLER lcl_salv_handler=>handle_click  FOR lo_events.
   SET HANDLER lcl_salv_handler=>added_function FOR lo_events.
   lo_table->display( ).

 

In T-code: -SE80 we have to create the toolbar buttons. 

Give status name and description. 

Here we have to select icon. 

Here we have to give toolbar button name select icons. 

In output screen we have to see the output. 

 

When I double click on a particular field value it will display value. 

Conclusion: 

By following these steps, you can enhance the functionality of SALV by adding a custom button and handling the associated events. This allows you to tailor the SAP List Viewer to meet specific business requirements and improve the user experience in your SAP applications. Always follow SAP development best practices and thoroughly test your SALV enhancements in a development environment before deploying to production.

entry.content:
Hello, 

When I view this class (created years ago) in source-based SE24 or in eclipse ADT, all seems fine. However, in the form based view, no methods appear. How could I resolve this?

System: ERP, Version: 750

entry.title: Automating MR21
entry.content:
Hi All,

Is there any option to schedule MR21 as batch job ? In Fiori we have this app 'Upload Material Inventory price Update' which also has the excel template which is awesome. Unfortunately the update cannot be scheduled to run at a designated time. I also checked a app called 'Application Jobs', but I am not sure if the app has the appropriate template or not.

As of now I am going to create (quite reluctantly) a custom app using a Mat price update bapi, but pls do suggest what's the best/alternate way to schedule and update price of list of materials ?

Best regds

Subha

entry.title: SAP EWM Load by Bill of Lading (ASR)
entry.content:
Hello,

In our current warehouse we load the FO by Bill of Lading using the RF. We manually create the BoL in the FO by copying the FO number. We do this because we cannot Load by FO. We have no issues doing this in this warehouse. 

Currently we are working on a new warehouse where we want to use the same process, however we get a error message saying: Bill of Lading or Freight Order Number XXX does not exist (/SCWM/RF_DE160). 

Any ideas?

Kind regards,

Ozgur

entry.title: MDG-F Hierarchy Assignment with Derivation
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

One of our customers asked us to derive the hierarchy, parent type and parent node based on the cost center number.

For example: Cost center number is 10148060. They want us to derive Hierarchy as 101 - Parent type as Cost Center Group and Parent Node as 1014.

However hierarchy attributes are not under the CCTR entity.  They are under CCTRH and CCTRG entities independent of CCTR.

My question is: Do you know any solution for hierarchy derivation?

entry.title: Re: [Local address contains control or whitespace] error...
entry.content: If you go to Administration > Users and filter on Wrong Email does anything show up? What about exporting to Excel and running an autoformat that checks for non-valid characters in the email? If nothing, and you can't narrow it down yourself (e.g. too many users in the ext_LEARNER OU/role) open a ticket.

entry.title: Substance Volume Tracking - Production Scenario and BOM
entry.content:
Hello Community Members,

I want to configure the SVT PRODUCTION (PRO) scenario but I am slightly confused on what option to be  selected since there are mixed opinion received and this makes it more complex.

I prepared a sample structure of Bill of Material levels for one product similar to the one available in the system (The Pic is attached)

Material BOM List V/s EHS

I have some questions here:

1) In the given example, is it okay to track the composition of only Main product (Real_sub)? In this case there are only two Pure subs. I assume that may not be correct.
2) Or I need to setup a same structure in SAP EHS (as a separate composition e.g Legal comp) so that it tracks at all levels drilling to the last pure sub?
3) Is there any need to develop a custom code logic to check BOM first.

Any hint or suggestions are welcome.

Thanks In advance

Ashish

entry.title: Re: Export of RPT to af file using ExportOption CrystalDe...
entry.content:
To get perfect HTML out of Crystal Reports, out put your report to PDF, then use nuget package SautinSoft.pdfFocus to convert the pdf to HTML.  I have tried many ways, this way works.

 

Public Shared Function ConvertPDftoHtml(pdfFile As String) As String
Dim htmlFileOut As String = pdfFile.ToLower().Replace(".pdf", ".html")
If File.Exists(htmlFileOut) Then
File.Delete(htmlFileOut)
End If

Try
Dim f As PdfFocus = New SautinSoft.PdfFocus()
f.OpenPdf(pdfFile)
If f.PageCount > 0 Then
Dim iResult As Int32 = f.ToHtml(htmlFileOut)
End If
f = Nothing
Catch ex As Exception
File.WriteAllText(htmlFileOut, $"ConvertPDftoHtml() Reports: {ex.ToString}")
End Try

Return htmlFileOut
End Function

entry.title: Re: To understand the usage and scenario coverage of scop...
entry.content:
Hi Edrilan-Berisha,

Good Day!

Thanks for the reply,

We want more details/documentation on the detailed working of Scope IDs 1MV and 4X8. Can you share any for reference?

 

We would also want to understand how this scope would help in scenarios where-

There is underpayments done by customers

Split payments on single invoice

Only customer name available in Memo

Discounts, bank charge and forex cases

Will these be catered to if the scopes are activated? or do we still have to rely on manual matching process?

Regards

Vishal Prakash

entry.title: Re: Getting excited about SAP Enterprise Product Development – how to find training for it?
entry.content: Please note that SAP's Public Cloud solution SAP EPD was renamed to SAP PLM in February 2024.

entry.title: Re: SAP Analytics cloud live connection exclude hierarchy...
entry.content:
Chart_GS.getDataSource().removeDimensionFilter(Alias.MeasureDimension);

..

Find relevant hierarchy nodes you want to include in an array

and try a button with the members you want to include ....

 

Or just a simple  static array with the members e.g.

Chart_GS.getDataSource().setDimensionFilter("0PROFIT_CTR",["0HIER_NODE!00000000000000000000301011010100","0HIER_NODE!00000000000000000000301011010200","0HIER_NODE!00000000000000000000301011020000","0HIER_NODE!00000000000000000000301011020100", "0HIER_NODE!00000000000000000000301011020200","0HIER_NODE!00000000000000000000301011050000"]);

entry.title: How to perform Replenishment in SAP WM?
entry.content:
Hi All,

I have config the replenishment control for Storage type that needs to replenish with 319 Movement Type. And the same movement is used in WM staging also so I need to do Replenishment for a Material with WM views having Replenishment data.My questions

1. If that material initially received according to the search strategy the stock goes into fixed bin by exceeding the Maximum Qty

2. in LP21 when I execute by giving Storage type we need to click on material stage and TR will get generate how can I config the source storage type and as per 1 question how can I distribute the stock to sources say Reserved stock and to Fixed Bin.

3. 319 Movement is used in both WM staging and Replenishment how can I do both scenarios with the same Movement type.

Thanks In Advance.

entry.title: Capture user entered DATE in QUERY as filter in a CDS VIEW
entry.content:
Hi,

Is there a way to capture the entered DATE by user in a QUERY and use that value as filter in a CDS VIEW?

How to do it?

Thanks.

Loed

entry.title: Re: How to use UDF values in FSM HTML report?
entry.content: Okay, so this is example way of solving this for aggregateValues function:

entry.title: Re: How to use UDF values in FSM HTML report?
entry.content: Handlebars.registerHelper('aggregateValues', (context, columnDefinition) => { if (columnDefinition.operator === undefined) { return; } if (columnDefinition.operator == 'concat') { return columnDefinition.aggregate.map(prop => { if (prop.startsWith('udfValue.')) { let udfValue = prop.split('.')[1]; return context.udfValues.find(udf => udf.meta.name === udfValue).value; } else { return Handlebars.helpers.get(prop, context); } }).reduce((acc, current) => acc + ' ' + current, ''); } if (columnDefinition.operator == 'difference') { return columnDefinition.aggregate.map(prop => Handlebars.helpers.get(prop, context)).filter(val => val).reduce((acc, current) => acc - current); } });

entry.title: Re: Adaptation Project Generator for VS Code - Adaptation...
entry.content:
Thanks for the hint, I've defined the proxy in my .npmrc, but it was the wrong proxy. I fixed it and now the adaptation editor is openend 🙂

When I start the editor, the following error message is displayed:

warn fiori-tools-proxy Unable to check if the 1.120.9 is available on the SAPUI5 SDK. Proceeding with loading the preview with this version.

entry.title: Re: Our Secret Skills
entry.content: Ability to make interviewee feel at ease so that they will talk and express ideas without formalizing them.  This allows for frustration to be expressed, show insights that were previously passed over, and bonus increase of bond for that network connection.

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hi @David_Chaviano 

I am a student pursuing Masters and I am a first a first-generation student. I am really excited to learn about SAP SF implementation as I want to build my career in SAP as a conusltant. Happy that SAP has such a great initiative to help everyone. Looking forward to the learning journey and the SAP beginners community. 

I have started with the RC Module. Please recommend which course should I take next. 

Best,

Ajay Solanki

entry.title: Re: How to use UDF values in FSM HTML report?
entry.content: How it works - if the prop value starts with udfValue.* then it search for udfValues with the name of it and returns its value. But keep in mind that it's just a POC - you need to add for example null checks or cover other edge cases (like missing udfValues etc). In template.js you can then use it as simple as "{headerKey: 'Mileage_Udf_Notes_L', aggregate: ['createPerson.firstName', 'udfValue.MILEAGE_NOTES'], operator: 'concat'}". Hope you can now improve it - for example with creating some generic function that takes care of it.

entry.title: Re: Creation of an employee in SAP SuccessFactors using $batch API
entry.content: Hello Aditya, Can you please share github link again?? The link is probably deleted.

entry.title: 5 Game-Changing Capabilities in Generative AI for Business
entry.content:
It’s no surprise that generative artificial intelligence (GenAI) is starting to have a profound impact on businesses. With its ability to unlock valuable insights, help make better decisions, automate tasks, and personalize experiences, the use cases are endless. As businesses increasingly recognize the potential of GenAI, key capabilities have emerged, reshaping lines of business and industries, and opening up new avenues for innovation and growth. 

Let’s take a look at five capabilities in GenAI that are changing the way businesses are run.  

1. Enhanced content creation: 

GenAI has transformed content creation by automating and streamlining the process. Businesses can now leverage AI algorithms to generate high-quality images, videos, and written content, saving time and resources while ensuring a consistent flow of high-quality content. 
 
2. Personalized customer experiences: 

Hyper-personalized customer experiences are now easily obtainable with GenAI. By analyzing vast amounts of data, AI algorithms can generate tailored recommendations, product suggestions, targeted campaigns, and more. This results in enhanced customer satisfaction and increased brand loyalty. 

3. Virtual assistants and copilots: 

The capabilities of digital assistants have become significantly advanced due to GenAI. These AI-powered tools can now engage in more natural and human-like conversations, understanding context and providing accurate responses – more akin to a copilot that understands every aspect of your business. Copilots can interact with customers, answer queries, perform tasks, provide personalized recommendations, handle customer support, and even streamline various business processes. 

 4. Simulation and optimization:

GenAI can simulate complex business processes and optimize them for maximum efficiency. By modeling different scenarios and variables, it can identify the most effective strategies and optimize processes accordingly, such as optimizing supply chain operations, logistics, resource allocation, or even financial forecasting. This can help businesses minimize risks, improve performance, and achieve better outcomes. 

5. Responsible and ethical AI: 

As GenAI becomes more pervasive, ethical considerations are becoming increasingly important. Businesses focus on developing and implementing frameworks for responsible AI usage. This includes addressing biases in AI algorithms, ensuring fairness and inclusivity, and establishing guidelines for AI governance. Organizations that prioritize ethical and responsible AI practices will not only mitigate risks but also build trust with customers and stakeholders.

Watch the video: AI Built into All Core Business Processes

As businesses continue to embrace GenAI, they can harness its potential to gain a competitive edge, drive innovation, and deliver exceptional value to customers. The future of AI technology holds immense promise, and its continued evolution will undoubtedly shape the business landscape well into the future. 

SAP gives customers AI capabilities embedded into SAP applications, empowering their business processes with AI that's as intuitive as it is flexible and powerful. Tailored to our customers’ unique data landscape and industry nuances, our AI enables smarter decisions and efficiencies at scale, while our unwavering commitment to responsibility ensures trust and compliance in every interaction. 

Interesting in learning more?

  • Learn more about SAP Business AI
  • Meet Joule, SAP’s AI copilot
  • What is generative AI?

entry.title: Re: How can we get details like Created By and Created On...
entry.content: Thank you, you can check the View Browser for the various views (for example I_SalesOrder has ERDAT and ERNAM) to see if the fields are already included. If they are not there, I don't think you have the option in public cloud to modify the SAP provided views. If you are a 3SL customer, you can explore Developer Extensibility to see you can create/extend your own views. The extensibility tags in the community may be useful in this case (https://community.sap.com/t5/b-erp-questions/SAP+S%25252F4HANA+Cloud+Extensibility/pd-p/270c4f37-c335-46e1-bfad-a256637d5e26) Thank you Jerry

entry.title: Re: SE24 does not show any method in form based mode
entry.content: Bug due to the scrolling position in the class previously viewed? (restart SE24 to make sure) If not, maybe it needs to run Clean Up or Regenerate Sections (SE24 menu in detail screen). Or SAP bug -> check SAP notes.

Thank you in advance.

Regards,

Josh

entry.title: Re: CL_SALV_GUI_TABLE_IDA
entry.content:
Hi all,

this is probably not relevant to OP anymore, but for all others researching that topic and stumbling about this question, here is the answer: This can be achieved via on object of class cl_salv_form_layout_grid (e.g. see ALV header ).

Just fill the objects attributes according to your needs and handover that object to method if_salv_gui_table_ida->fullscreen( )->set_top_of_list( ).

BR Chris

entry.title: Self intro to Beginner Corner
entry.content:
Hello All,

I am Venkat. Though I have IT experience, I am new to SAP world.

Looking forward to learn with the help of this vibrant community.

Thanks to David for the great initiative and letting me know about this group.

Thanks

Venkat

entry.title: Can AI code in ABAP?
entry.content:
Hello Community,

Have you wondered if using the available free AI tools you can create programs in ABAP? I did some experimentation and have these conclusions:
1. simple things can be done, although it is not perfect. I don't know how from the programmer's point of view, because it's probably much faster for the developer to write the program himself. But maybe the small parts. Someone who has absolutely no idea about SAP is unlikely to handle it. But if someone needs a simple report, and doesn't know how to program, it can work.
2. language models are great for explaining code. And here I see a huge potential for SAP consultants who do not know how to program. This feature could be super useful for many people.

You can see more here:

And what are your experiences with AI and ABAP?

entry.title: Re: Adaptation Project Generator for VS Code - Adaptation...
entry.content: Hi, ist the application now loading in the browser for you? The message "warn fiori-tools-proxy Unable to check if the 1.120.9 is available on the SAPUI5 SDK. Proceeding with loading the preview with this version.", is just a warning message indicating that the UI5 version checked failed (probably because of the corporate proxy), you can ignore this message.

entry.title: Re: Premium Hub CoE – DSC Knowledge Bits – “A simple setup guide to integrate SAP TM with Hana Spati
entry.content: To spare anyone from making the same mistake I did, the API key needs to have double underscores and in this format:   "api__key":"XYZ123..."  .  (section 4.2.3 Assign Method Parameters to a Strategy)

Could be a user error in creating a planning object including the description. But we are not able to find any issues in regards to that. 
We have raised it as an OSS to SAP as well.

entry.title: Re: How to make restriction field an import parameter in...
entry.content:
I found what I was requested.

In parameter SHLP_DESCR of callback form, there is a field FIELDPROP which can set IMPORT, EXPORT, SPos, LPos just like standard search help can do.

This discussion helps.

https://community.sap.com/t5/application-development-discussions/how-to-display-restriction-dialog-box-for-fm-f4if-int-table-value-request/m-p/7447746

entry.title: Re: Need a list of SAP Notes related our Focused Insights...
entry.content: Following the release of SP9, individual Note corrections will be delivered for the Focused Insight Dashboards. These notes can be found in the Central Note for Focused Insights.

entry.content: Same here, Did you figure out how to do this? I tried the feeder class of the app I am trying to set up but not much clue there either

entry.title: The "source to pay" process explained for beginners
entry.content:
Let's talk about a business process called the "Source to Pay" process or Purchase to Pay process. This is an essential concept that helps businesses and companies manage their purchasing efforts effectively. When a company needs to buy something, this is the process it should follow.

Think of it as a sequence of steps involved in buying any item — whether it's a bike, a phone, or a sweater from your favorite online shopping website — except this process is followed by companies.

Step 1: Determining Requirements: It's just like making a shopping list. The business department identifies what they need and make a list or a purchase requisition. This can be done manually or through an automated process known as the MRP (Materials Requirements Planning) system.

Step 2: Where to Buy and From Whom: Before you buy a product online, you generally compare prices from different websites, right? Similarly, businesses also decide from where they will buy the item. They can refer to past orders, agreements, or digital records.

Step 3: Purchase Order Processing: The business then creates a purchase order, which is a formal document for the seller. This is just like adding an item to your cart and reviewing it before you make the payment. Some data from previous transactions or quotations can also be copied to save time.

Step 4: Purchase Order Monitoring: Like how you track your order after you've bought something, businesses also keep a check on their purchase orders. They can see if the goods or invoice has been received and can also remind the sellers about any pending deliveries.

Step 5: Goods Receipt: When the goods are received, they are entered in the system, and any inconsistencies in goods or quantities are checked. Also, the purchase order history is updated — just like updating your shopping or order history!

Step 6: Invoice Verification: The invoice received from the seller is carefully scrutinized for its accuracy and calculations. It’s just like you checking your bill after you’ve received your order.

Step 7: Payment Processing: Like finalizing your online order by paying through your card or internet banking, businesses also execute a payment program to clear off the payments to the vendor. This is done regularly by the accounting department.

Apart from this, businesses also have to deal with international trade transactions, which involve two software services: Foreign Trade and SAP Global Trade Services (GTS). Goods bought from foreign countries come under this, and this is checked if any third-party foreign trade systems are used.

For material management and inventory management, the Material Ledger is used. Just like you managing your bookshelf, sorting your books, knowing which book is kept where and how many book spaces are empty, businesses manage their materials and inventory. They also keep track of the movements of goods, their prices, and even forecast future valuation.

Lastly, regarding output management, businesses decide on how to handle printed materials, such as invoices, order confirmations, delivery notes, etc. Also, they use SAP S/4HANA Analytics, which allows real-time reporting, making the whole process much more efficient.

In a nutshell, managing procurement effectively is essential for running a successful business. The Source to Pay process, just like your online shopping process, ensures this by systematically organizing every step from identifying the need for a product to paying for them. No step is skipped or overlooked, ensuring efficiency and cost-effectiveness.

It's like your online shopping but think of it on a much, much larger scale and with a lot more data to handle. Next time you place an order online, know that you are, in essence, imitating a business process called Source to Pay.

You can learn more about this process here.

entry.title: BN4L GTT- Event management
entry.content:
Hi All, 

We are trying to deploy BN4L solutions to be integrated with S4HANA Emebbed TM. We have requirement to populate Expected Events as well as Actual Events in Freight order. With the GTT module do we still to be setup SAP Event Management to populate Expected Events and actual/unexpected Events in Freight order ?

I understand that for Portal access events can be triggered directly from BN4L. But for EDI-214 within BN4L what proxy that will be used ? Do we still need to do all the mapping exercise to receive the Events from Carrier EDI ?

Thanks 

Saravanan G

entry.title: ability to open .dwg files from SAP Service and Asset Manager
entry.content: Has anyone downloaded a .dwg (CAD) file as an attachment in SAM and been able to link out to a viewer on the iPad?  Is there any configuration that would support assigning a particular view app to file type?

entry.title: Re: MKVZ Enhancement by creating a custom program

Didn't you identify BAdI ME_CHANGE_OUTTAB_CUS (online help) / ES ES_BADI_ME_REPORTING which should solve your requirement.

entry.title: Re: Automatic update of purchase order price from info re...
entry.content:
Hi,

SAP standard functionality is not available for such scenario however you can make a false change to the PO and it will trigger the updated price from PIR.

Thanks,

Sanan

entry.title: SAC Flat Presentation of Hierarchy - show ID instead of names/description
entry.content:
Dear all, 

after 2 weeks getting basic understanding I have the following challenge with my script in SAC. In general everything works fine. I created some filters to show regions (in a hierarchy) as flat presentation. However - I would like to get the ID instead or at least in addition to the name/description to be shown in my table. this is my script:

Table_3.getDataSource().setHierarchy("RegionStructure",Alias.FlatHierarchy);

Do you know what I have to adjust in order to only show the member ID instead of the description  in #SAC?

Many thanks.

Chris

entry.title: Re: Automatic update of purchase order price from info re...
entry.content: Furthermore, my assumption is whenever the PO is created it is already sent to Vendor, so you will send the revised PO to Vendor again?

entry.title: Re: Sending a doc to DMS
entry.content: Thanks. It worked

entry.title: SAP CodeJam Roadshow 2024
entry.content:
Yes, someone did say “Roadshow”!  Attention SAP Developers!  Thomas Jung and I are hitting the road again this year for another SAP CodeJam Roadshow in Europe.  Last year, we drove about 1500km around Germany and the Netherlands, I don’t think we will be doing that again anytime soon.  This time the roadshow is a bit more spread out geographically, so it will be planes and trains for us this time.   We will have 5 stops on the roadshow from April 12th through April 22nd 2024.  Below is a listing of the SAP CodeJam events on the roadshow schedule

04/12/2024     Amsterdam, Netherlands    

  • ABAP Cloud & RESTful Application Programming Model  Details and Registration

04/15/2024     Bucharest, Romania           

  • ABAP Cloud & RESTful Application Programming Model  Details and Registration

04/17/2024     Leverkusen, Germany         

  • ABAP Cloud & RESTful Application Programming Model  Details and Registration

04/19/2024     Paris, France                       

  • ABAP Cloud/RAP & CAP  Details and Registration

04/22/2024     Madrid, Spain                     

  • ABAP Cloud/RAP & CAP   Details and Registration        

I have a feeling these events will fill up fast, so if you want to join us for a day of coding awesomeness,  make sure to register to secure your seat.  I’d also like to take a second and thank our hosts for partnering with us on these events.  Thanks to PVH and Partners in Technology in Amsterdam,  IBM in Bucharest, Covestro in Leverkusen, VINCI Energies in Paris, and of course our own Antonio Maradiaga at SAP Espana in Madrid.

See you all somewhere in Europe on the roadshow!

entry.title: Re: Wht is the reason for payment block if we done GR aft...
entry.content:
Hi,

Did you check the OMR6 entries for AN, PP & DQ tolerance keys. Please share the screenshot from those Keys if possible 🙂

Thanks,

Sanan

entry.title: Re: Highlights of Transportation Management in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition 2023 (FPS01)
entry.content: Thanks for sharing. Great news about sales order scheduling !!

entry.title: Re: Automating MR21
entry.content:
Hi,

I am assuming you also have access to SAP GUI (if this is correct) then, first create the Variant for the Program SAPRCKM_MR21 and save it. After that use sm36 to create the background job for the same Program SAPRCKM_MR21 and Variant. There are many threads on SM36 and SM37 you will find it easily.

Let me know if you have any questions.

Thanks,

Sanan

entry.title: Re: SAP GRC 10.0/10.1/12.0 - Emergency Access Management - Make It Audit-Ready!
entry.content: Hi Raghu. Can you please provide details on how to implement assigning Firefighter ID for hours rather than days.

entry.title: Re: Only value true is permitted as telephoneListComplete...
entry.content:
Hi @knutheusermann 

We have an similar issue: I would like to update the telephone information for a specific employee (using ManageEmployeeIn2)

Unfortunately, only the field "Mobile" gets updated, but I would like to update field "Phone" as well. In my payload there are 2 telephone numbers. Only the second one is filled in the field "Mobile" when sending the payload. 
What I have noticed: When I send the payload with only the first number (without the second "telephone" data), the field "Phone" is updated. But as soon as I add the second number, it does not work.
Could you help us here, please?

<soapenv:Envelope xmlns:soapenv="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/envelope/" xmlns:glob="http://sap.com/xi/SAPGlobal20/Global">
	<soapenv:Header/>
	<soapenv:Body>
		<glob:EmployeeDataBundleMaintainRequest_sync>
			<BasicMessageHeader>
				<BasicMessageHeader>
				</BasicMessageHeader>
			</BasicMessageHeader>
			<EmployeeData addressInformationListCompleteTransmissionIndicator="true" workplaceAddressInformationListCompleteTransmissionIndicator="true" employeeTypeListCompleteTransmissionIndicator="false" identificationListCompleteTransmissionIndicator="true" commonListCompleteTransmissionIndicator="true" actionCode="01">
				<ChangeStateID/>
				<ObjectNodeSenderTechnicalID>Update ManageEmployee</ObjectNodeSenderTechnicalID>
				<UUID>8b0c2e5c-2773-1ede-b4c4-c7a9d31cce72</UUID>
				<WorkplaceAddressInformation actionCode="04" addressUsageListCompleteTransmissionIndicator="true">
					<ObjectNodeSenderTechnicalID>wp_adress_info</ObjectNodeSenderTechnicalID>
					<UUID>8b0c2e5c-2773-1ede-b5fb-164a9077cfc5</UUID>
					<Address actionCode="04" telephoneListCompleteTransmissionIndicator="true" workplaceTelephoneListCompleteTransmissionIndicator="true">
						<ObjectNodeSenderTechnicalID>wp_address</ObjectNodeSenderTechnicalID>
						<Telephone>
							<ObjectNodeSenderTechnicalID>ADDPHONE</ObjectNodeSenderTechnicalID>
							<TelephoneFormattedNumberDescription>+49 222 22 27</TelephoneFormattedNumberDescription>
							<MobilePhoneNumberIndicator>false</MobilePhoneNumberIndicator>
						</Telephone>
						<Telephone>
							<ObjectNodeSenderTechnicalID>MobilePhoneNumber</ObjectNodeSenderTechnicalID>
							<TelephoneFormattedNumberDescription>+49 15772391877</TelephoneFormattedNumberDescription>
							<MobilePhoneNumberIndicator>true</MobilePhoneNumberIndicator>
						</Telephone>
					</Address>
				</WorkplaceAddressInformation>
			</EmployeeData>
		</glob:EmployeeDataBundleMaintainRequest_sync>
	</soapenv:Body>
</soapenv:Envelope>

SAP Business ByDesign #

entry.title: Re: Quantity fixed for delivery

entry.title: Re: Cannot enable Change Document flag on Data Element
entry.content:
Hi,

My understanding is that the Document Change Management is not activated in your system. It is totally a different Module in SAP. May be someone else can explain in more details.

Thanks,

Sanan

entry.title: Re: Query, based on Sales Doc being 3 months old
entry.content:
Hi @RL7   

The SAP Learning group helps you to develop the knowledge, grow your skills, and  future-proof your career. Here you can ask questions and collaborate with other learners to reach your learning goals and to prepare for your SAP Certification exams. 

It looks like your question is not related to learning materials we published on our SAP Learning platform and while the topic you addressed  isn't specifically covered here and since it can hardly be answered without in-depth implementation knowledge, I can point you to several excellent resources to help find an answer to your question.

I would like to encourage you to post your  question to a our SAP Community where you can directly exchange with experienced experts with project background -  SAP Community is a public space where anyone can start discussions and questions are answered by anyone. SAP Community enables professionals across the globe to connect, exchange information, engage, and receive recognition for your achievements. This inclusive and receptive environment welcomes all individuals who want to seek help and share knowledge about SAP software and solutions.

If you need help, and your issue is specific to the standard functionality of your SAP solution, contact SAP Product Support using the channel listed below which best suits your business impact

 

 If you need help, and your issue is specific to the standard functionality of your SAP solution, contact SAP Product Support using the channel listed on our our Get support site.

 

In addition  might also be helpful.

 

Please always feel free to come back to our SAP Learning group to ask your questions and collaborate with other learners to reach your learning goals and to prepare for your SAP Certification exams.

However, for your particular question, I'd recommend the resources above.

Therefore, I close this thread.

 

I hope this helps, and best of luck!

Margit

entry.title: Display the data of an ABAP program or FM in a composite provider
entry.content:
Hi,

Is there a way to display the data of an abap program or an FM in a composite provider?

Basically, I wanted to show the data generated by an abap program in a BW QUERY WITHOUT STORING the data of the abap program to any table.

Is this possible?

Thanks.

Loed

entry.title: Re: ADT installation error - Eclipse 2023-12
entry.content: Did you check their server status at https://status.eclipsestatus.io/

entry.title: Re: Import BPMN Models in SAP Cloud ALM
entry.content:
Hello,

Any integration with Signavio in the plan? How to better reconciliate the Process discovery and build in Signavio with Cloud ALM? Do they work together or would it be a duplication of effort?

entry.title: S4 HANA Public Cloud Extensibility
entry.content:
Hi,

Can I use a S4 HANA Public Cloud remote API within S4 HANA Cloud ABAP environment itself instead of SAP BTP ABAP environment, If I don't have any local api available. How to set up the communication scenario if the use of remote api is possible within S4 HANA Cloud itself?

Thanks,

Siva

Kristina

entry.content:
Yes, someone did say “Roadshow”!  Attention SAP Developers!  Thomas Jung and I are hitting the road again this year for another SAP CodeJam Roadshow in Europe.  Last year, we drove about 1500km around Germany and the Netherlands, I don’t think we will be doing that again anytime soon.  This time the roadshow is a bit more spread out geographically, so it will be planes and trains for us this time.   We will have 5 stops on the roadshow from April 12th through April 22nd 2024.  Below is a listing of the SAP CodeJam events on the roadshow schedule

entry.title: How to create MTA Descriptors for the CPI flows
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

I am configuring the SAP Cloud Transport Management system for the transport of the Integration Suite artifacts.

In the Transport Node overview I noticed the option to set the MTA Extension Descriptor:

You can see the Add options.

 

But what I trying to understand, is how the Descriptor should look like for the iflows or any other integration artifacts?
Please share some examples, if you have been working with it.

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: Re: Cannot enable Change Document flag on Data Element
entry.content:
Hi Again,

Then I will suggest you check your screen layout from Configuration if those are editable fields or just Display. 

Thanks,

entry.title: Re: Learning frustrations of an SAP Developer
entry.content: 100% true

entry.title: Re: ATC Central Remote Server - Roadmap
entry.content:
Hi John,

yes, as you correctly noticed the successor for the SAP NetWeaver 7.52 for the central ATC system on-premise is the SAP S/4HANA (Foundation). It is also essential to use the newer release on-premise as a central ATC system since the amount of new S/4HANA systems grows constantly in customers landscapes and a central ATC on-premise can check the systems only of the same or lower releases. You can upgrade your central ATC system from SAP NetWeaver to SAP S/4HANA (Foundation) by retaining all your ATC settings, ATC runs and ATC exemptions.

We currently recommend ATC on SAP BTP for the management of the modern SAP S/4HANA-based landscapes (Private Cloud and on-premise). Currently there are some limitations (for example baseline and parallel ATC runs are not yet supported), in addition not all SAP GUI ATC features can of course be recreated, so the functional scope looks currently as described in the blog (+ ATC features which will be delivered during 2024, like baseline): Usage of ABAP Test Cockpit (ATC) in the cloud for on-premise developments. Currently there is no migration path from ATC on-premise to ATC on BTP, you need to start from scratch with ATC on SAP BTP, but some topics are already planned, like migration of ATC exemptions from on-premise ATC system to the ATC on SAP BTP is already in our development backlog.

Furthermore the ATC on SAP BTP is becoming currently more and more important since it has many advantages like using the CVA security checks without an additional license, no on-premise system needs to be set up and maintained, the new ATC features are delivered faster on SAP BTP,  upgrades are carried out by SAP on regular base and so on. Further ATC developments and optimizations will be delivered primarily for ATC on SAP BTP.

Kind Regards,
Olga.

entry.title: Re: Problem in creating Object dependency in BOM
entry.content: Check if your quotation mark is italic or not. if it is italic change it with a normal one

entry.title: Submit program with multiple values
entry.content:
Hi everyone !
I’m trying to submit a program with multiple objects. I am able to achieve a single object with this piece of code however the need is for multiple objects to be populated into the select option when the program is called.

Select from [table] Appending table [table]

where obj = wa-obj

apoend wa-obj to it_modif-obj

endselect .

submit prog

via selection-screen

with p_prog = wa-obj

and return .

I have tried several ways like using rsparams to creat the table and submitting the program with selection_table and also this way:

data: t_param type table of rsparams

s_param type rsparams

s_param-selname = ‘P_PRGNAM’.

s_param-kind = ‘P’

s_param-low = it_modif-obj.

Append s_param to t_param.

submit program

with selection-table = t_param

and return .

 

I have asked others and have was unable to come up with a solution .Not a real guru at this so figured why not try asking here .If anyone has any suggestions that would be much appreciated! 

Thanks !

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hello @David_Chaviano,

I recently came across the post titled " Breaking Barriers and Fighting Sexism: Lin’s Journey from a Salesgirl to an SAP Consultant" from SAP Learning Blog Posts, and I must say, it left me inspired.

Allow me to introduce myself. I am a first generation college student, currently live in Germany for family reasons. In the past three years, I dedicated myself to learning the German language, and reached business communication level. Now that my children are settled in primary school, I find myself with the opportunity to be back to the work. However, as German is not my native language, I encountered certain invisible barriers when seeking job opportunity in the field of my university studies. Finally, with many years of love for the field of informatics, I decided to switch my career mid-life.

Now I am studying computer theory knowlege at a vocational school and working as an apprentice in a company at the same time. I was introduced to SAP through various online platforms such as Udemy and YouTube. I finally found that the online SAP learning journey combined theoretical knowledge with practical application demos, allowing for a quick understanding suits me. I am eager to continue this learning journey and get SAP certification.

My colleagues at work support me when I have questions, but they are still busy with their daily work. I am also keen to structured, systematically and comprehensive study to gain a thorough understanding, and my goal is to get a formal position in the future.

Thanks for this opportunity.

entry.title: Role collection export - import
entry.content:
Dear experts,

I created severel collections roles (around 10) with their dedicated role assignments into an active subaccount for sustainability apps (SFM-RDP-SCT).

I would like to export and import these new role collections to another subaccounts. I did not find standard procedure to run it.

Is there a way to run export and import flow for a selected range of collection roles ? Thanks in advance for your answers.

Best regards,

Hervé

entry.title: Treasury and Risk Management for Public Cloud TDD System
entry.content:
Hi SAP experts,

Could you please assist how can Treasury component FIN-FSCM-TRM-CNT be activated on a existing TDD system?
In the Partner' pricing app, under TDD, no available option exist to add this component as an additional licence. Does it mean no demo system exist for TRM?

Best regards,
Aleks

entry.title: Re: Supercharge Your SAP HANA Cloud Experience with SAP EarlyWatch Alert
entry.content: So far no security-related alerts are integrated into the automated SAP EarlyWatch Alert for SAP HANA Cloud. You can find security recommendations for SAP HANA Cloud in general on help.sap.com here when you filter the page for component SAP HANA Cloud and priority critical.

entry.title: Re: Welcome all SAP Community members, start here!
entry.content:
Hello and welcome @CharlyRed - perhaps you already know of and have joined the Barcelona Group?
There you can learn about local SAP Inside Track events and network with others. I've some other interesting links to share with you below:

  • Topic pages (get to know about SAP products)
  • Blog posts (read what other community members have to say)
  • Discussion Groups (discuss, connect, share)
  • What's New (stay up-to-date with what's new in SAP Community)

entry.title: Re: SAP Stammtisch Zurich: previous sessions
entry.content:
Hi @JK 

Are you still organizing SAP Stammtisch in Zurich? How about getting a beer (or whatever fav drink for others is Zurich community) in the afternoon on March 14th before my SAP CodeJam on the following day?

Regards,
-Vitaliy

entry.title: Re: SAP EWM Add a field to fields catalogue
entry.content:
Hello, 

Did you find a solution to your problem?
I have the same problem on my side and I would like to know if you have found a solution to share it with us

Thanks

entry.title: Re: Why you should use Poetry instead of Pip or Conda for Python Projects
entry.content:
@richdev

Hey there, just putting my hands up and admitting, I goofed up! In my haste to hail Poetry as the knight in shining armour, I committed the crime of tagging Pip as a dependency management tool. Fair enough, while basking in my honeymoon period with Poetry, I was a bit over-enthusiastic in my, errr, poetic praises for it, tipping my blog post in its favour.

That confession aside, let's set some records straight. As a tech writer, I do my homework. I've immersed myself in the oceans of blogs, documentations, and whatnot about Pip, Conda, and Poetry. I didn't set out to rehash the same content (otherwise, why would I bother writing a fresh post, hmm?). I’ve had my hands in the pie of all three tools, granted not fully for Pip or Conda. I basically penned down my experiences, or the 'Aha!' moments I had with these tools during my project work. Sadly, my heavy-handed endorsement for Poetry muffled this key message (too bad, ChatGPT wasn’t around then to save me).

Time for some earnest talk – I'm no propagandist, and misleading readers is the last thing on my list. I might have been pretty vocal in my assertions, but trust me, each one was truth-tested based on my own experiments, no airy-fairy tales there. Since your insights on this topic have definitely broadened my horizon, I'm game to modify my stance a bit. Being married to one tool isn’t wise, so from proclaiming a "Poetry, or nothing!" mantra, I've moved to a more balanced "Use the best tool for the job at hand" approach. While I still lean towards using Poetry given a chance, I believe it's all about personal choice. So let’s not shy away from managing packages/dependencies/environments with your tool of choice, or even embracing the lesser-loved tools, as situation demands.

Fingers crossed you find this response apt.

PS: Not to forget, Poetry does some nifty environment management tricks too. So, should I pull you up for misleading us with that source article?

Just kidding!

 😉

entry.title: Re: Production Version
entry.content:
Hello Ravi,

Please explore functionality of Order split , Hope this helps
https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-blogs-by-members/split-production-order/ba-p/13265892

Regards,

Amit

entry.title: READ TABLE with OR condition
entry.content:
Hi experts,

I would like to read the most recent entry from an internal table itab based on a condition.
Let's assume the table looks like this and is sorted by the field Timestamp:

FlagTimestamp (DD-MM-YYYY HH:MM:SS)
A01-03-2024 12:00:00
C01-03-2024 11:00:00
A29-02-2024 15:27:00
B29-02-2024 14:13:00
A28-02-2024 10:00:00

I would like to fetch the most recent entry for which Flag is either B or C and I know that a possible solution would be to loop through the table:

 

LOOP AT itab into wa.
    IF wa-flag = 'B' or wa-flag = 'C'.
        EXIT.
    ENDIF.
ENDLOOP.

* Continue processing using wa

 

However, since I am already perfoming this opration in a nested loop, I would like to avoid adding another loop to the logic.

I also found solutions suggesting to use READ TABLE statements for each of the conditions, but they so not seem to be applicable in the situation described above:

  • OR condition in key while reading internal table.. 
  • Read Table with OR condition

 

Are there any alternatives to looping through the entire table to fetch the most recent entry for which Flag is either B or C? Would SELECT - FROM @itab for example be a valid and recommended approach in this situation?

I'd highly appreciate any thoughts and suggestions in this regard.

entry.title: Re: Batch Managment
entry.content:
Hello Ravi,

In standard you can assign only one batch number at order level, To meet the requirement you can have partial GR's and assign different batches numbers during Production order Goods receipt.
Hope this helps!!

Regards,

Amit

entry.title: SAP ERP enhancement
entry.content:
Hi everybody! I am an absolute begginer in sap area therefore i ve installed SAP on a OpenSuse vm and also Sap GUI for learing purpose.

"SAP NetWeaver AS ABAP Developer Edition 7.52 SP04"

But on the Sap Menu folder list(see the image) there are no logistics, finances etc. It seems SAP enhancement package for erp is needed, but how exactly can i do this? Or is something else i need in this case ? thanks

entry.title: Re: Output/Printing configuration for S4HANA Service Quot...
entry.content:
0. Import some necessary xmls https://me.sap.com/notes/0003135878

1. Make config in app Output Parameter Determination SAP Fiori Apps Reference Library (ondemand.com)
If not possible, go to step 0.

2. Read this -> Practical use of BRF+ Application to design the Ru... - SAP Community

entry.title: Configuration Transport Center - Instance Pairing
entry.content:
Establishing transport route between source and target tenant is the first step towards, this blog describes step by step how to pair 2 tenants

Pre-requisites – please assign the needed roles to the user by following the SAP help documentation here

Instance Pair Wizard

Step 1:

Goto Configuration Transport Center > Transport Routes > Click on Add New Pair

After filling the details for the target tenant and environment, you need to press generate token

Step 2:

Now, Login to target tenant > Goto Configuration Transport Center > Transport Routes and copy the generated token by clicking on copy token

Step 3:

Paste the token in the source tenant “instance pairing wizard” screen and click on validate

Step 4:

This completes the instance pairing configuration, which will be confirmed on the screen – you should be able to see the same in the transport route details.

Conclusion:

  • This is done via “Transport Routes“ section in the configuration transport center tool UI
  • Pairing instance is guided by “Instance Pair Wizard“ through 4 steps – no restriction on the environments and data center, the list is upto date
  • Deleting an instance pair always happens in the source system

entry.title: Re: BN4L GTT- Event management
entry.content:
Hi @shravangs 
The SAP Learning group helps you to develop the knowledge, grow your skills, and  future-proof your career. Here you can ask questions and collaborate with other learners to reach your learning goals and to prepare for your SAP Certification exams. 

It looks like your question is not related to learning materials we published on our SAP Learning platform and while the topic you addressed  isn't specifically covered here and since it can hardly be answered without in-depth implementation knowledge, I can point you to several excellent resources to help find an answer to your question.

 

I would like to encourage you to post your  question to a our SAP Community where you can directly exchange with experienced experts with project background -  SAP Community is a public space where anyone can start discussions and questions are answered by anyone. SAP Community enables professionals across the globe to connect, exchange information, engage, and receive recognition for your achievements. This inclusive and receptive environment welcomes all individuals who want to seek help and share knowledge about SAP software and solutions.

If you need help, and your issue is specific to the standard functionality of your SAP solution, contact SAP Product Support using the channel listed below which best suits your business impact

 

 If you need help, and your issue is specific to the standard functionality of your SAP solution, contact SAP Product Support using the channel listed on our our Get support site.

Please always feel free to come back to our SAP Learning group to ask your questions and collaborate with other learners to reach your learning goals and to prepare for your SAP Certification exams.

However, for your particular question, I'd recommend the resources above.

I hope this helps, and best of luck!

Margit

entry.title: Re: Consumption for Component from DM not executed in S/4...
entry.content:
Hi Christoph, 

 After you perform the component consumption, check app "integration Message dashboard", if there is message generated against message type "Production order Good issue" and any error associated. Also check collaboration link configuration maintained against Good issue for production order as below?

Hope this helps.

Thanks

Rahul
